headline: Public Service Enterprise Group Awards Meet Valuation And Risk Questions
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) has received several high profile recognitions for responsible business practices, community investment, and workforce initiatives. Recent awards from JUST Capital and Newsweek highlight the company’s approach to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards. These recognitions focus on PSEG’s role in serving customers, supporting communities, and investing in its employees. PSEG, the parent company of New Jersey based utility Public...
